Notice And Motion For Leave To Amend Complaint
Off Calendar Sep-21-2020 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF TROY YOAKUM's Motion For Leave To Amend Complaint is Off calendar. The court granted defendant Mercury Insurance Company's unopposed motion for summary judgment by order dated August 25, 2020.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Notice Of Motion And Motion By Defendant Mercury Insurance For Summary Judgment Or, Alternatively, Summary Adjudication Of Issues
Off Calendar Aug-25-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Stanley Goff, Esq. 415-571-9570 scraiggoff@aol.com for Plaintiff.
Julian Pardinai, Esq. 415-362-2580 of Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith for Defendant.

RULING - A R G U E D.(as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT MERCURY INSURANCE's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, Alternatively, Summary Adjudication Of Issues.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

Grant. No opposition filed.

Order is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
